title: Floater (disambiguation)
content:
'''Floater''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[A-1 Deluxe Floater]]''', a capsule-shaped [[landspeeder]] featuring a pod-like [[cockpit]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[A-1 Deluxe Floater/Legends|'''A-1 Deluxe Floater''']], a landspeeder model produced by [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]].
*[[Floater (Bouncer)|'''Floater''']], a [[Bouncer]] of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].
*'''[[Floater-935]]''', an offshoot of the [[Ubrikkian]] [[Desert Sail-20 Skiff]], a type of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]].
*[[Floater (creature)|'''Floaters''']], an umbrella term for numerous airborne species of animals usually living in the atmospheres of gas giants
**'''[[Floater shark]]''', one of two [[Diet/Legends|predatory]] subspecies of floaters found in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]].
**'''[[Floater squid]]''', the other predatory floater that lived in the atmosphere of Yavin Prime.
*[[Floater (ship)|'''Floater''']], an armed air vehicle used on [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]].
*'''[[Floater flea]]''', a small [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insect/Legends|insect]], native to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
*'''[[Floater globe]]''', a form of art, using miniature repulsorlifts
*'''[[Floater pad]]''', a vehicle part found on the underside of [[Airspeeder/Legends|airpseeders]].
*[[Floater pad (furniture)|'''Floater pad''']], a model of chair that had an integrated [[antigrav unit]]. 
*'''[[Floater plat]]''', a repulsorlift platform used by security officials.
*'''[[Floater Vehicles Department]]''', a government agency.
*'''[[Hutt floater]]''', a repulsorlift conveyance designed to move [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] around.
*[[Landspeeder/Legends|'''Landspeeder''']], informally known as a floater.
*'''[[V5 medium cargo floater]]''', a type of [[Hoversled/Legends|hoversled]] manufactured by [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]].

{{Disambig}}
